description: MCP HTTP server for AI integration

functions.name: start
functions.description: Start the MCP HTTP server on localhost

functions.name: getServerInfo
functions.description: Get current server status, port, and connection file path

functions.name: getCurrentAuthToken
functions.description: Get the auth token currently used by the running MCP server

functions.name: getAccountAccessConfig
functions.description: Get the current account access control configuration

functions.name: getToolAccessConfig
functions.description: Get the current tool access control configuration

parameters.name: disabledTools
parameters.description: Array of tool names to disable. Empty array means all tools enabled.

parameters.name: getMessagesLimit
parameters.description: Maximum number of messages getMessages may read in one call. Must be an integer from 1 to 20.

functions.name: setAccountAccess
functions.description: Set which accounts the MCP server can access

parameters.name: allowedAccountIds
parameters.description: Array of account IDs to allow. Empty array means all accounts.

functions.name: getBlockSkipReview
functions.description: Get the Block skipReview preference. It defaults to true and gates direct mail sends plus event/task creation.

functions.name: setBlockSkipReview
functions.description: Set whether skipReview is blocked. The preference defaults to true; skipReview is honored only after it is explicitly set to false.

parameters.name: blockSkipReview
parameters.description: When true (the default), sendMail, replyToMessage, forwardMessage, createEvent, and createTask reject skipReview=true and require their review window or dialog. Set false explicitly to allow those tools to honor skipReview.

functions.name: getStableAuthToken
functions.description: Get the stored stable auth token preference

functions.name: setStableAuthToken
functions.description: Set the stored stable auth token preference

parameters.name: stableAuthToken
parameters.description: Stable token to reuse across MCP server starts. Empty string clears the preference and restores per-startup rotation.

functions.name: generateAuthToken
functions.description: Generate a fresh auth token string

functions.name: getListenAll
functions.description: Get whether the server listens on all network interfaces

functions.name: setListenAll
functions.description: Set whether the server listens on all network interfaces. When enabled, the server is accessible from other machines on your network (e.g. WSL, Docker). Warning: this bypasses localhost-only binding and exposes the MCP endpoint beyond this machine, though auth token is still required.

parameters.name: listenAll
parameters.description: When true, server binds to 0.0.0.0 instead of 127.0.0.1. Server will be restarted.
